 tags=[\"api-reference\"],\n)\n\n# Import from database\nmem.import_sqlite(\n  path=\"legacy-knowledge.db\",\n  mapping={\"question\": \"content\", \"answer\": \"metadata\"},\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Querying Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# Natural language query\nresults = mem.recall(\"How do I authenticate with the API?\")\n\n# Structured query\nfacts = mem.query_facts(\n  predicate=\"requires_authentication\",\n  object=\"true\",\n)\n\n# Hybrid: natural language + structured filter\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"API authentication\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\"],\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Maintaining Knowledge"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Outdated Information"}],"\n",["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# Mark as outdated\nmem.update(\n  id=\"mem_old_auth\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\", \"outdated\"],\n)\n\n# Add replacement\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"API v2 uses OAuth 2.0 with PKCE.\",\n  tags=[\"api-reference\", \"current\"],\n  importance=0.9,\n)\n\n# Query only current\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"API authentication\",\n  exclude_tags=[\"outdated\"],\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf"],["$L10"],"$L11"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@12"]},null,false,"$@12"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L13",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$14",["$L15"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"hOmP2Cy-yrrgTKgwHamoc"}

a:["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# Lower confidence for unverified info\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"API\",\n  predicate=\"rate_limit\",\n  object=\"1000 req/min\",\n  confidence=0.6,  # Unverified\n)\n\n# Higher confidence after verification\nmem.add_fact(\n  subject=\"API\",\n  predicate=\"rate_limit\",\n  object=\"1000 req/min\",\n  confidence=0.95,  # Verified from docs\n)\n","language":"python"}]

d:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Use Case: Customer Support"}]
e:["$","$L8",null,{"code":"# Initialize with product docs\nmem.import_documents(\n  paths=glob(\"product-docs/**/*.md\"),\n  tags=[\"product-doc\"],\n)\n\n# Agent handles support ticket\ndef handle_ticket(ticket):\n  # Recall relevant docs\n  docs = mem.recall(ticket.description, tags=[\"product-doc\"])\n  \n  # Check for known issues\n  known = mem.query_facts(\n      predicate=\"affects_version\",\n      object=ticket.version,\n  )\n  \n  # Generate response\n  response = generate_response(docs, known, ticket)\n  \n  # Store interaction\n  mem.remember(\n      content=f\"Ticket {ticket.id}: {response.summary}\",\n      tags=[\"support\", f\"ticket-{ticket.id}\"],\n  )\n  \n  return response\n","language":"python"}]
